violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing.-Discovered portion serving utensils in the dry food bins that are stored in the product. Portion utensils should not be stored in product.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..)* were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair.- The fan by the entryway between the front counter and baking area have an accumulation of dirt on the blades.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
